description_long: This handcart is constructed primarily from wooden planks, reinforced with metal brackets and bolts at key joints. It features a rectangular load platform with vertical wooden side rails on both sides, providing containment for cargo. The cart is supported by two large, spoked wheels with metal rims, attached to the sides near the rear. The front of the cart extends into two parallel wooden handles, designed for manual pushing or pulling. The wood grain is visible throughout, and the metal components have a matte, slightly worn finish. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for transporting goods or materials in an urban environment.
description: A sturdy wooden handcart with metal-reinforced joints, side rails, and two large spoked wheels, designed for manual transport of goods.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cart, two large wheels, and the parallel wooden handles extending forward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open end of the load platform, the two handles, and the side rails.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wheels, side rails, and the metal reinforcements on the wooden frame.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the load platform, both wheels, and the vertical side rails.
